added.4C8u97: Our goal is to help you stay informed about your teen's Discord activity so you can have meaningful conversations and support them as they navigate digital spaces. We provide insights into how your teen uses Discord, and your teen sees the same information, to encourage open dialogue. We allow you to see:
added.5x3taM: New friends that you added or accepted
added.8m2ROd: Guardians can set up safeguards to give their teens the best experience on Discord while being safe.
added.FcKkcr: Includes servers you have recently created, joined, sent messages in, or participated in a voice and video call
added.GWPcQg: All gifts you received in the last week, including who sent them and how much they spent
added.HdcGGl: Set a monthly budget for your teen's Discord purchases, including shop items, gifting, and more. Does not include subscriptions.
added.MKeCj3: Your guardian can set a monthly budget for your Discord purchases, including shop items, gifting, and more. Does not include subscriptions.
added.PQtDFk: Includes servers your teen has recently created, joined, sent messages in, or participated in a voice and video call
added.PfveQ6: Your guardian can schedule times when Discord won't be available. Use this time to take a break and recharge.
added.WZwGFX: New friends that your teen added or accepted
added.f7ofm/: Give your teen a break by choosing the hours and days when Discord won't be accessible.
added.nxO3NK: Press and hold to open the shortcut menu. Slide and release to pick one.
added.yFnKIg: All gifts your teen received in the last week, including who sent them and how much they spent
added.zzgr9Q: Our goal is to help you get the support you need when you need it, while still protecting your privacy. That's why your guardians won't see the private contents of your messages, but they will be able to see:
